creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
To clarify, current portversion is 8.7.20

- 8.7.21 contains (contained) the security fixes [1]
- 8.7.22 is bugfix only (which also fixes regressions in 8.7.21 [2]

Pending (requires) VuXML entry and requires MFH

[1] https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/8.7.21
[2] https://typo3.org/article/typo3-952-8721-and-7632-security-releases-published/
